![A dog enjoys the fresh air](https://laurakarki.com/images/a_dog_enjoys_the_fresh_air.jpg)

#### [Furry Darlings](https://galleryhalmetoja.com/exhibitions/3786/)

Solo exhibition at Gallery Halmetoja 25.4.-18.5.2025. Exhibition opening 24.4.2025 at 17-19

#### [Künstler=innen](http://subjectobject.de/index.html)

Group exhibition at Galerie subjectobject 8.3.-5.4.2025. Exhibition opening 7.3.2025 at 19-22

#### [The new you-we-me](https://vbk-art.de/the-new-you-we-me/)

Part of EMOP Berlin (European Month of Photography). Group exhibition at Verein Berliner Künstler gallery 15.3.-6.4.2025. Exhibition opening 14.3. at 19

#### [UPDATE 2025](https://vbk-art.de/)

Group exhibition at Verein Berliner Künstler gallery 11.4.-11.5.2025. Exhibition opening 11.4. at 19

#### [Visiting Art/ists 2024: Ich finde dich in allen diesen Dingen](https://finnland-institut.de/events/visiting-artists-2024-goman-jaeaeskelaeinen-kaerki-pussinen-raesaenen-salonen/?lang=en)

Group exhibition in Finnland-Institut 8.2.-14.11.2024. Opening 8.2. 18-21. [Link to the catalogue PDF](https://finnland-institut.de/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Visiting-Artists-2024-ScreenPDF_verkleinert.pdf)
